_comment: TheOrc Foundry recipe TEMPLATE — theorc-reviewer v0. Follow-on #4: requires a stable gold finding set first (docs/THEORC_FOUNDRY.md).
phase: pre-F-1 (no gold finding set, no baseline report)

job.name: theorc-reviewer-qwen25-7b-qlora-v0
job.description: Review diffs and emit evidence-backed findings. Depends on the Reviewer Quality Gate trust pattern (docs/REVIEWER_QUALITY_GATE.md) and a stable gold finding set to score recall/precision and false-CLEAN rate against.

dataset._dataset_note: Task universe not frozen. Candidate shape: diff + context → findings list with evidence. Capture points: reviewer-adapter investigation docs (docs/reviewer-adapter/) and Reviewer Quality Gate outcomes.

gates.blocked_reason: Per docs/THEORC_FOUNDRY.md this track starts after a stable gold finding set exists. The B-3 reviewer-adapter results (docs/reviewer-adapter/) are prior art for why an unmeasured reviewer adapter is not promotable.

stop_rule: If the current general-model reviewer with the Quality Gate already achieves the target false-CLEAN rate, retain it — a specialist must beat it on the gold finding set.
